War Dog Brigand: ranged support platform; chaincannon for horde/screens, spear for vehicles
War Dog Executioner: cheapest War Dog; autocannon for light vehicles, meltagun melee deterrent
War Dog Huntsman: anti-tank spear + melee chaintalon; versatile killer
War Dog Karnivore: pure melee threat; chaintalon+claw both Sustained Hits; 14" M
War Dog Moirax: flexible loadout; lightning lock for horde, volkite for elite, grav for vehicles
War Dog Stalker: flexible; chaincannon ranged + claw/chaintalon melee; scout option
Knight Abominant: Balemace [EA] + Electroscourge; volkite combustor for elite killing
Knight Desecrator: laser destructor (S18 AP-4) + melee arm; 4++ invuln
Knight Despoiler: any 2 arm weapons; modelled with gatling+battle cannon; flexible
Knight Rampager: pure melee; 12" M, chainsword+claw both Sustained Hits; 4++ invuln
Knight Ruinator: ranged focus; darkflame lance torrent + terrorpulse missiles; fellbore melee
Knight Tyrant: castle gun platform; volcano lance + desecrator cannon + harpoon; T12
Chaos Acastus Knight Asterius: T13 30W; volkite culverin + conversion beam + mortar
Chaos Acastus Knight Porphyrion: T13 30W; twin magna lascannon + ironstorm + autocannons
Chaos Cerastus Knight Castigator: bolt cannon (18A S6 AP-2) + warblade; TEQ hunter
Chaos Questoris Knight Styrix: rad cleanser + volkite + graviton crusher + siege claw
